title: more calming fireflies
description: I find the sound of fireflies really grating so I replaced it with a different Night Ambience sound
body:
I find the sound of fireflies really grating so I replaced it with a different Night Ambience sound.

Initially made for Java snapshot 25w32a, should support every snapshot/version for a long time.

Currently supports [pack_format](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Pack_format) values 65.1 to 900 (900 is an arbitrary number, but it should keep this pack from breaking for a long time).
